SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINITFF ASHLEY BERHEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SAMNANTHA DUVALL, VICE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN SHYDER IS PRESENT. MR. SYNDER WAIVED SERVICE OF AMENDED CALIME SEP-15-17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE STATED SERVED JUN-29-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERHEL, ASHLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-31-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AHSLEY BERHEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SAMANTHA DUVALL, VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT TO REFLECT THE PROPER DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-26-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ASHLEY BERHEL AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE SAMANTHA DUVALL, PROPERTY MANAGER FOR CHANDLER PROPERTIES. ALSO PRESENT IS STEVEN SNYDER, OWNER OF THE PROPERTY IN QUESTION. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND HER COMPLAING AND ADD STEVEN SNYDER AS A DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER. MR. SNYDER WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERHEL, ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNYDER, STEVEN $5,738.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,843.00, PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED A PAYMENT UNDER THE SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE SECTION 37.9 C AND, IN ADDITION IS ENTITLED TO THE TEMPORARY DISPLACEMENT ALLOWANCE UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1975.9, UP TO NINETEEN DAYS. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CHANDLER PROPERTIES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS AN IMPROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,913.00 FILED BY BERHEL, ASHLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-13-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SAMANTHA DUVALL, AND DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
